title: MoonWay Creativecore
description:
Plugin for creative server from MoonWay Creative.
This plugin create new commands with cutsom sort of blocks.
body:
# MoonWay Creativecore

Plugin add commands for give any variants of blocks. From server MoonWay Creative. This plugin create new commands with cutsom sort of blocks.

**Now the project is in slow development.**

# Usage:

* /allwood - all types of wood (without planks)
* /allwooden - all types of wooden planks
* /allstone - all types of stone (in dev)
* /buildtools - Creative kit (Based on player demand)
* /ccinfo - show info about plugin

Plugin in active development, so if you found bugs create issue on github!
